readings.summary: The law of the Lord is near to you.

readings.citation:
Ps 69:14, 17, 30-31, 33-34, 36, 37
Turn to the Lord in your need, and you will live.

Ps 19:8, 9, 10, 11, R. v.9a
Your words, Lord, are Spirit and life.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 69:14, 17, 30-31, 33-34, 36, 37
Turn to the Lord in your need, and you will live.

Ps 19:8, 9, 10, 11, R. v.9a
Your words, Lord, are Spirit and life.

readings.summary:
Your words, Lord, are Spirit and life;
you have the words of everlasting life.

antiphons.text:
As for me, in justice I shall behold your face;
I shall be filled with the vision of your glory.
The sparrow finds a home, and the swallow a nest for her young: by your altars, O Lord of hosts, my King and my God. Blessed are they who dwell in your house, for ever singing your praise.

Whoever eats my flesh and drinks my blood
remains in me and I in him, says the Lord.
